description_long: This shotgun features a robust, stylized design with a combination of wood and metal elements. The stock and grip are crafted to resemble polished wood, adorned with subtle engraved patterns, while the barrel and receiver are constructed from a matte, dark metal. The barrel is short and wide, with a pronounced flared muzzle, giving it a blunderbuss-like appearance. A cylindrical component sits atop the receiver, possibly representing a sight or loading mechanism, and is secured with metallic bands. The trigger guard is angular and open, providing easy access to the trigger, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The overall aesthetic is reminiscent of a steampunk or fantasy weapon, blending traditional craftsmanship with industrial accents.
description: A stylized shotgun with a wooden stock and grip, dark metal barrel, and a flared muzzle, featuring engraved details and a cylindrical top component.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved wooden stock, ergonomic grip, and the full length of the flared metal barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, flared muzzle and the cylindrical top component aligned above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, grip, and the metallic bands securing the cylindrical top component.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden stock and grip, with the barrel and muzzle receding into the background.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a short, wide, flared muzzle; no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: angular, open design with a squared profile and no finger grooves or reinforcement
